S.FORM: = Nicolás Maduro = Mntucing hngkawas 1962 idas 11 jiyax 23 ka Nicolás Maduro ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Venezuela ta sayang o kiya ka Nicolás Maduro, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 4 jiyax 19 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = niʦol*s maduɾo = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka niʦol*s maduɾo ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan *ənə*uəla ta sajaŋ o kija ka niʦol*s maduɾo, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Nicolás Maduro = Mntucing hngkawas 1962 idas 11 jiyax 23 ka Nicolás Maduro ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Venezuela ta sayang o kiya ka Nicolás Maduro, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 4 jiyax 19 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = niʦol*s maduɾo = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka niʦol*s maduɾo ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan *ənə*uəla ta sajaŋ o kija ka niʦol*s maduɾo, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
